baseline_mismatch.recommended_resolution_direction: INDEX=25.0 confirmed as canonical baseline; RS updated to match; floor-designation should apply to perpetrator conduct, not capacity-constrained victim-states.

key_evidence: Microsoft Azure/Unit 8200 finding: ~200M hours of intercepted Palestinian phone calls — strengthens the assessment that Palestine is the target rather than the perpetrator of mass surveillance
Score confirmed at 25.0 (Developing): the benchmark distinguishes capacity-constrained victim-states from perpetrator conduct, so floor designation is not applied to Palestine
Assessment reflects the documented constraints on a state's capacity to recognize, respond to, and reduce suffering under occupation
